_comment: BPM ground truth for manual and automated testing of the BPM detector.
_methodology: Reference BPMs established via librosa 0.11 beat_track() on the first 60 seconds of each track, then cross-checked against genre/stylistic expectations.
_license: All tracks by Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com), licensed under CC BY 4.0. Attribution: Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com) / Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 License / http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
_tolerance_note: tolerance_bpm is the acceptable ±deviation for our autocorrelation detector. Set conservatively at ±10 BPM; tighten as the algorithm improves.

tracks.notes: Steady funk groove in 4/4. Good baseline test for mid-tempo detection (~100 BPM range).
Upbeat jazz-funk. Tests the 120-130 BPM range common in house and pop.
Driving orchestral action track. Tests detection on mixed orchestral+percussion content.
Fast-paced staccato comedy track. Tests upper BPM range (~165-170). Watch for octave-down detection at ~83 BPM.
